title: MusicGenerationCache
description: Redis coordination keys for dd-music-rs. Postgres music_songs and music_song_votes remain durable; Redis only holds daily generation targets, a short generation lock, and short-lived anonymous vote throttles.

$dd:redis.summary: Hot keys for daily song generation coordination and anonymous vote throttling.

keys.name: MusicDailyGenerationTargetKey
keys.description: Redis STRING integer containing the 3-5 song generation target for one UTC date. SET with EX TTL; missing entries can be recomputed deterministically.

keys.name: MusicGenerationRunLockKey
keys.description: Redis STRING lock token used to avoid concurrent generator sweeps across dd-music-rs replicas. Acquired with SET NX EX.

keys.name: MusicSongVisitorVoteKey
keys.description: Redis STRING short-lived throttle for one anonymous visitor hash voting on one song. Durable vote state lives in Postgres.

params.name: visitorHash
params.description: SHA-256 visitor hash derived from gateway forwarding metadata and a service salt.
